What I Do

Who I Am

About Me

I'm Abdulrahman Faraj, an Administration Officer & MIS Specialist with extensive experience in the higher education sector. I manage the full cycle of institutional compliance and reporting — from Financial & Semester Reports for regulatory bodies, to government invoices, sponsorship audits, and the development of university-wide academic calendars and study plans.

Beyond administration, I independently designed and built a Comprehensive BI Dashboard that transforms raw institutional data into executive-ready insights. This dynamic platform provides a holistic view of university performance, including enrollment trends, graduate outcomes, faculty metrics, and student funding, bridging the gap between compliance operations and data intelligence.

My edge: I don't just manage data — I architect systems that make it speak clearly to decision-makers. From PUC reports to Power BI dashboards, every output I deliver is built for precision and impact.
